rows.description: Computus Francisci Webber Rectoris a 2do die Novembris 1765. ad eundem diem revolutione 1766.
rows.notes: Selected 'gpt-5-mini' for the description, specifically the ending 'revolutione', which is clearly visible in the image. Both agree on row type and empty amounts.
rows.section_header: Computus Francisci Webber Rectoris a 2do die Novembris 1765. ad eundem diem revolutione 1766.

rows.notes: Selected 'gpt-5-mini' for the description, as the column labels clearly show 'L: s: d' (capital L, lowercase s and d). Both agree on row type and empty amounts.
Consensus between extractors. Visually confirmed as accurate.
Selected 'gemini-flash'. Visual verification confirms the description starts with 'Weston' (not 'Newton') and the pounds value is clearly '7' (not '3'). Both agree on row type, shillings, and pence.
rows.english_description: Rent received from Weston due at the feast of All Saints (All Hallows).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from Weston due at the feast of All Saints, amounting to £7 8s 8d.

rows.notes: Selected 'gemini-flash'. Visual verification confirms the description '– ad Fest Mich:' (Michaelmas). Both agree on row type and amounts.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from Weston due at Michaelmas, amounting to £3 12s 8d.
